message:
test(lax): add unit tests for tensor reshape, transpose, slice, pad, concatenate, and broadcast

Add comprehensive test module to tensor_ops.rs covering reshape (1d->2d,
flatten, same-shape), transpose (2d, identity perm), dynamic_slice and
dynamic_update_slice, pad (1d zero-pad), concatenate (axis 0 and 1),
broadcast_in_dim (scalar->vector, vector->matrix), squeeze, and
expand_dims. Each test validates output values and shapes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
